_comment: GHARMIND AI — Frozen demo state for hackathon presentation. Friday Oct 25, 2024 06:08 IST.

twin_state.context_summary: Festive Friday morning. Diwali 3 days away. Motor overdue 8 mins — CRITICAL. Geyser ON. School bus in 67 min. Power cut risk tonight 7:30pm. JEE mock exam Monday.

predictions.title: Water Motor — Run Immediately
predictions.description: Tank at 38%. Motor overdue by 8 minutes. School bus in 67 minutes. Diwali week water usage is 40% higher than normal. If not run now, tank hits 20% critical threshold by 8am.
predictions.action_suggestion_en: Run the water motor now. Tank is at 38% — critical threshold approaching.
evidence: Motor ran between 06:00-06:30 on 14/14 Fridays (last 3.5 months)
Tank below 45% on 11/14 of those mornings
Similar past morning (Oct 18, similarity 0.94): motor ran at 06:12
School bus at 07:15 — 67 min window closing
predictions.reasoning: Historical pattern (14 Fridays) combined with current tank level (38%), active Diwali week multiplier (+40% usage), and school departure constraint (07:15) produces 94% confidence. The similarity matcher found last Friday (Oct 18) as the closest historical context — that morning the motor ran at 06:12. Today is already 8 minutes past that. Every minute of delay increases risk.

predictions.title: Priya's School Bus — 07:15
predictions.description: School bus arrives at 07:15. Breakfast must be served by 06:55. Bag check by 07:05. Priya currently getting ready in Bedroom 2.
predictions.action_suggestion: Breakfast ready karo 6:55 tak. Priya ka bag check karo.

predictions.title: Rahul's Zoom Call — 10:00
predictions.description: Rahul has a recurring Friday morning Zoom call. WFH confirmed (pattern: 91% consistency). Quiet mode required in living room 09:45–10:45.
predictions.action_suggestion: Zoom call se pehle living room quiet rakhna. 9:45 se.

predictions.title: Load Shedding Expected — 19:30
predictions.description: MSEDCL Friday evening pattern for this zone. 3 of last 4 Fridays had power cut at 7:30pm. Duration: 60-90 minutes typical.
predictions.action_suggestion: 7 baje se pehle dinner ready karo. Devices charge karo. Rahul ka Zoom khatam karna hoga.
evidence: MSEDCL Friday 7:30pm cut: 3 of last 4 Fridays confirmed

predictions.title: Diwali Prep Day 2 — Decoration Shopping
predictions.description: Day 2 of 5-day Diwali prep. Today: decoration shopping and rangoli material. Best time: 5pm (after Rahul's WFH day ends, before 7pm power cut risk).
predictions.action_suggestion: Sham 5 baje decoration shopping — Rahul saath le jao. 7 baje se pehle wapas.

what_if_simulation.name: Power Cut on Diwali Prep Evening
what_if_simulation.gharji_narrative: Anjali ji, agar aap 6:45 tak ghar nahi aayi aur 7:30 baje light gayi, toh Rahul ka Zoom call abruptly cut ho jayega aur dinner 9 baje tak delay ho sakta hai — Dadi ke liye yeh theek nahi. Ek chhota plan change sab fix kar sakta hai.
cascade_chain: 19:30:03 — WiFi router loses power (3 second delay)
19:30:05 — Inverter kicks in (2.5 hr capacity at current load)
19:35 — Anjali returns, begins cooking in dark kitchen
20:45 — Dinner served (105 min delay vs baseline)
21:05 — Water motor MISSED tonight's window → tomorrow morning risk

impact_matrix.mitigation: Send 'back at 8' message before 7:20pm. Reschedule or use mobile data hotspot.
Start dinner at 18:15 (before shopping return). Or Anjali returns by 18:00.
Dadi eats light snack at 7pm as backup if dinner delayed.
Use diyas and torch during cut — actually more festive!
Run motor BEFORE 7:15pm cut tonight. Last window is 7:15.

action_plan.action: ⚠️ RETURN BY THIS TIME (not 6:45 — cut is at 7:30!)
Start dinner prep immediately on return
Rahul: save all work, send Zoom 'back at 8' message
Charge ALL devices fully (phones, tablets, Priya's laptop)
Dinner must be SERVED — family eating by 7pm
Run water motor — LAST WINDOW before cut
⚡ Expected power cut — HOUSEHOLD FULLY PREPARED
Diwali decoration work continues by diya/candle light

risk_flags.risk: Rahul's Zoom call drops mid-presentation if no action taken
risk_flags.mitigation: Pro-actively reschedule or use mobile hotspot as backup

risk_flags.risk: Dadi eating dinner at 9pm — health concern for elderly
risk_flags.mitigation: Light snack at 7pm guarantees she's not hungry if dinner delayed

risk_flags.risk: Water motor missed → tomorrow morning tank critically low
risk_flags.mitigation: Run motor by 7:15pm tonight — this is the hard deadline

conflict_detection.label: Diwali + JEE Mock Collision — Monday

conflict_zones.conflict: Pooja bells vs Priya's pre-exam concentration
First guests arriving vs Priya's exam departure
Festive noise, cooking, visitors vs post-exam rest/study

conflict_detection.gharji_resolution: Dono ho sakta hai — bas thodi planning chahiye! 🙏

revised_monday_plan.action: Dadi's private aarti — bedroom, quiet bells only
Main pooja starts — bells MUTED until 8am (Priya sleeping)
Priya wakes — study session in quiet Study Nook
Priya's exam-day breakfast — special meal from Anjali
Rahul drives Priya to exam center (return by 8:20)
FULL Diwali celebrations begin — bells, guests welcome
First guest wave — living room fully festive
Priya returns — Study Nook reserved, quiet enforced
Priya joins family for evening Diwali celebrations

demo_end_state.gharji_closing_message: Your home is ready for the day. And for Diwali. 🪔
